install.evidence: codex plugin marketplace add <repository-root> --json and codex plugin add vibe-diagram@imchenway --json installed and enabled version 0.1.0-rc.1

discovery.evidence: A new App-bundled codex exec context reported skill id vibe-diagram:vibe-diagram and the installed cache SKILL.md path

invocation.evidence: App-bundled codex exec --ephemeral --sandbox workspace-write invoked the installed skill and exited with code 0

html_delivery.evidence: The requested self-contained HTML exists, the delivery-acceptance linter returned OK, and the remote-resource scan returned no matches

artifacts.request_record: public-normalized reproduction; only the privacy-path prohibition wording changed after execution; observed facts and output requirements are unchanged

visual_qa.observation: The 1440x813 desktop and 500x757 effective narrow viewports are fully readable without horizontal clipping; an earlier 390px screenshot was rejected because macOS Chrome headless enforced a 500px minimum layout width and cropped the image.
